ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR STATUS ON REGARDING THE MINOR'S REPORT CARD/GRADES/PROGRAM , CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2019 HEARING HELD. THE MINOR IS NOT ATTENDING SCHOOL AND A REPORT CARD IS NOT PRESENTED OR ON FILE. THE MINOR IS NOT RESIDING IN THE GUARDIAN'S HOME. MINOR STATES THAT HE IS LIVING WITH FRIENDS. THE COURT STATES THAT THE MINOR IS A WARD OF THE COURT AND ORDERS HIM TO RETURN THE GUARDIAN'S HOME. COUNSEL IS TO LOOK IN TO THE MINOR'S OPTIONS REGARDING ENROLLING IN SCHOOL AGAIN. A STATUS ON THE MINOR'S RETURN HOME IS SET FOR JULY 16, 2019 AT 1:30 P.M. IN DEPT. 204. - (SEE MINI-MINUTES THIS DATE FOR FULL DETAILS)
